# Data Directory

Raw and processed data files live here. All files are gitignored except this README.

## Contents (generated by Notebook 01)

| File | Source | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `entso_unavailability.parquet` | ENTSO-E Transparency Platform | FR nuclear unavailability notices; fetch timestamps logged |
| `rte_generation.parquet` | RTE éCO2mix | FR generation mix + forecasts |
| `epex_gb_id_hourly.parquet` | EPEX Spot historical reports | GB hourly ID settlement prices |
| `elexon_da_prices.parquet` | Elexon Insights API (MID) | GB DA baseload prices |
| `neso_ifa_flows.parquet` | NESO Historic Demand Data | IFA + IFA2 flows |
| `neso_wind.parquet` | NESO | GB wind DA forecast + actuals |
| `neso_demand.parquet` | NESO | GB demand DA forecast + actuals |
| `epex_fr_da.parquet` | EPEX Spot | FR DA price post-08:00 clear |
| `ttf_spot.parquet` | EMBER / ICE | TTF natural gas spot (D-1 if live feed unavailable) |
| `fr_temperature.parquet` | open-meteo | French temperature deviation |
| `de_wind.parquet` | ENTSO-E / Agora | German wind generation |

## Structural Break Note

IFA2 implicit coupling commenced 2020. Main regression sample is **2020–2026**.
Pre-2020 data retained only for the reduced-form IFA flow regression (Notebook 01).
